final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin live stream featuring "神仙姐姐" holding a sign, designed for social media sharing.

Style/medium: mobile UI screenshot of a live streaming interface, clean modern Douyin aesthetic
Composition: 9:16 vertical format, live stream interface layout with viewer count and comment bar at bottom, streamer centered in frame
Subject: "神仙姐姐" (a graceful female streamer) holding a handheld sign at chest level, warm engaging expression
Scene/backdrop: softly lit indoor streaming room with subtle ambient lighting
Lighting/mood: warm flattering ring-light glow on the streamer's face, cozy intimate atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones against soft neutral background, the sign in contrasting light color for readability
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！
Constraints: 9:16 aspect ratio, sign text clearly legible, authentic Douyin live stream UI elements visible
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered background, unreadable small text, Western streaming platform UI elements
